title: [brain download]
description: Tim Ferriss Meta Learning accelerated Learning inspired "coursera/udemy course builder" that formats the course using deconstruction, selection, sequencing, stakes and compression, encoding, and frequency to optimize the learning experience while also providing quality scripts for video creation for Udemy, with PDF and other tools.
